fields.name: PrimeWright
fields.tagline: Government-contract bidding, run like a ledger.
fields.about:
PrimeWright is a bidding platform for small businesses that go after federal contracts. It pulls your SAM.gov solicitation pipeline into one place, runs AI-assisted bid analysis on fit and price-to-win, and tracks loss intelligence so every no-bid teaches you something.

The AI assists. A human decides. Every bid/no-bid, every price, every submission goes through a hard human gate before it leaves the building. No autopilot on federal money.

Built for small and mid-size GovCon operators who are tired of chasing every SAM.gov notice and want discipline over noise: qualify faster, source smarter, and stop bidding jobs you were never going to win.

Federal bid management, capture and proposal tracking, and price-to-win intelligence, in one ledger.
fields.specialties: Government contracting software, GovCon, SAM.gov bid tracking, federal bid management, capture management, proposal management, price-to-win, bid/no-bid analysis, small business federal contracts

fields.short_description: Government-contract bidding software for small businesses. SAM.gov pipeline, AI-assisted bid analysis, human sign-off on every bid. Run your GovCon pipeline like a ledger.
fields.about_story:
PrimeWright helps small and mid-size businesses bid on federal contracts without drowning in SAM.gov notices.

It tracks your solicitation pipeline, flags the opportunities worth chasing, and runs AI-assisted analysis on fit and price-to-win, but every decision, every bid, every dollar quoted still goes through a human before it's final. The AI assists. You decide.

We built PrimeWright because most small businesses lose federal bids to bad process, not bad work: missed solicitations, no price-to-win discipline, no memory of why the last three bids lost. PrimeWright fixes the process so your team can focus on the proposal.

Government-contract bidding, run like a ledger.

fields.bio: Building PrimeWright, a pipeline and price-to-win tool for small businesses chasing federal contracts. Ex-bidder, tired of losing to bad process, not bad proposals. Here to talk GovCon, not pitch you.
Government contract bidding, run like a ledger. SAM.gov pipeline, AI bid analysis, human sign-off. For small businesses chasing federal contracts.
